name: stripe_quickbooks_reconciliation_mismatch
summary: Stripe payouts do not match QuickBooks invoices during weekly reconciliation, forcing finance ops to manually rebuild the ledger in spreadsheets.

name: deleted_orders_still_showing_in_analytics
summary: Deleted Shopify orders still appear in analytics exports, so operators manually clean reports before weekly inventory and finance review.

name: manual_work_is_painful_generic
summary: Small businesses waste hours on manual work, repetitive tasks, and follow-ups every week.

name: plugin_support_is_bad
summary: Support ignored me, the plugin is overpriced, and the product is bad now.
